story_results.summary: Register, login, update avatar+bio, read profile all return correct fields
Create, list, update name, non-owner delete returns 403, owner delete succeeds, project returns 404 after
Add member (200), member sees project (200), remove member, removed member gets 403
Create task with all fields, list returns it, update status to done works, delete returns 404 after
Filter status=todo returns 2 tasks, priority=high returns 1, sort by due_date returns correct order
Member creates comment with author+timestamp, list returns it, non-member gets 403
Delete project cascades to tasks (404) and comments (404)
Register, login, update avatar+bio, profile read returns correct fields
CRUD works; non-owner delete returns 403, owner delete returns 204
Added member sees project (200), removed member denied (403)
Task created with all fields, listed, updated to done, deleted (204)
Filter by status=todo (2 results), priority=high (1 result), sort by due_date ascending correct
Member comments with author+timestamp, non-member gets 403
Deleting project cascades to tasks (403/gone) and comments (404/gone)
